text:
or coordination of benefits was deducted from the total paid/allowed amount at the header only 
(PYMT_LVL_IND = "3"), then the line-level paid amount (LINE_MDCD_PD_AMT) would be blank and 
line-level allowed (LINE_MDCD_ALOWD_AMT) and header level total allowed (MDCD_ALOWD_AMT) 
and total paid (MDCD_PD_AMT) amounts must all be populated but the line level allowed amounts 
are not expected to sum exactly to the header level total allowed.
